title: Multi-view Body Part Recognition with Random Forests
query: Multi-view human pose estimation using part appearance and random forest 3D aggregation
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of human pose estimation, given images taken from multiple dynamic but calibrated cameras. title: Using sentiment analysis technique for analyzing Thai customer satisfaction from social media
query: Sentiment analysis technique for Thai customer satisfaction in online social media reviews
abstract: With the rapidly increasing number of Thai online customer reviews available in social media and websites, sentiment analysis technique, also called opinion mining, has become an important task in the past few years.This technique aims to analyze people’s emotions, opinion, attitudes and sentiments.

query: Fuzzy logic hybrid approach Malayalam movie sentiment analysis natural language processing application
abstract: In this paper, Sentence level Sentiment Analysis of Malayalam movie reviews is done by classifying the polarity of opinions obtained from the user as positive, negative and neutral. title: Generative models for image segmentation and representation
query: blind spatio-temporal segmentation algorithm for image segmentation in video sequences without semantic knowledge.
abstract: This PhD. Thesis consists of two well differentiated parts, each of them focusing on one particular field of Computer Vision. title: A Bayesian Model for Generative Transition-based Dependency Parsing
query: Transitional dependency parsing using Hierarchical Pitman-Yor Processes with particle filter inference
abstract: We propose a simple, scalable, fully generative model for transition-based dependency parsing with high accuracy. The model, parameterized by Hierarchical Pitman-Yor Processes, overcomes the limitations of previous generative models by allowing fast and accurate inference. We propose an efficient de

title: A comparison of genetic programming feature extraction languages for image classification
query: Genetic programming languages comparison for image classification with feature extraction using selection
abstract: Visual pattern recognition and classification is a challenging computer vision problem. Genetic programming has been applied towards automatic visual pattern recognition. title: Ensemble of Generative and Discriminative Techniques for Sentiment Analysis of Movie Reviews
query: Ensemble machine learning methods for sentiment analysis using generative language models
abstract: Sentiment analysis is a common task in natural language processing that aims to detect polarity of a text document (typically a consumer review). In the simplest settings, we discriminate only between positive and negative sentiment, turning the task into a standard binary classification problem. We

title: Structured Sparse Priors for Image Classification
query: Model-based compressive sensing with structured sparse Laplacian prior in image classification applications
abstract: Model-based compressive sensing (CS) exploits the structure inherent in sparse signals for the design of better signal recovery algorithms. title: Portuguese geolocated tweets
query: Portuguese geolocated tweets database characteristics analysis of sentiment and user demographic.
abstract: This paper describes an existing database of geolocated tweets that were produced in Portuguese regions. title: Dimensionality Reduction by Integrating Sparse Representation and Fisher Criterion and its Applications

abstract: Sparse representation shows impressive results for image classification, however, it cannot well characterize the discriminant structure of data, which is important for classification. title: Performance Improved PSO based Modified Counter Propagation Neural Network for Abnormal MR Brain Image Classification
query: Performance of modified counter propagation neural networks incorporating particle swarm optimization in MR brain image analysis
abstract: Abnormal Magnetic Resonance (MR) brain image classification is a mandatory but challenging task in the medical field. title: Applying sentiment and emotion analysis on brand tweets for digital marketing
query: lexicon-based sentiment analysis on brand tweets for digital marketing purposes
abstract: As digital marketing is becoming more popular, the number of customer views on brands is increasing rapidly. title: Scene Oriented Classification of Blurry and Noisy Images Using SVM with Fuzzy C Mean Clustering
query: Fuzzy C-Mean clustering with Support Vector Machine for blurry and noisy image classification
abstract: Image classification is a challenging task in image processing especially in the case of blurry and noisy images. title: Specifications and Analysis of the Korean Sentiment Analysis Corpus

abstract: This paper describes the two year endeavor of constructing the Korean Sentiment Analysis Corpus (KOSAC), focusing on the theoretical background and the analysis of the corpus itself.
